name: NREM Parasomnia Capture Model Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Enhanced nights with fuller PSG montage → Systemic: Increased data quality and false alarm rates → Strategic: Improved phenotyping analysis and algorithm development.
options: Standardized PSG protocol with technician-flagged events for clinical-grade resolution
Tiered acquisition model with nightly low-burden monitoring and scheduled enhanced nights
Dynamic PSG montage adjustment based on participant-specific parasomnia patterns
review: Controls false alarm rates vs. manageable staffing ratios.
